HRT.name: Hortus Station
HRT._note: Keplerian fit from 209 origin samples spanning full orbit including periapsis. FIO a and e confirmed by observed r_peri=45347.8km matching FIO prediction exactly. Mean error 1.38km, p95 2.28km, max 2.40km. Held-out validation (6 post-1782626000 samples) 2.2-2.4km. Previous provisional fit (8 apoapsis-only samples, e=0.071) retired. Fitted 2026-06-28 chat session.

ANT.name: Antares Station
ANT._note: Keplerian fit from 681 origin samples (631 SYSTEM_TRAFFIC_SHIP + 50 SHIP_FLIGHT_MISSION). FIO a and e confirmed exactly by observed r_peri=33554.7km and r_apo=33652.1km matching FIO predictions to 0.1km. Mean error 6.65km, p90 9.86km, max 13.50km. Nearly circular orbit (e=0.00145), periapsis angle irrelevant at this eccentricity. Fitted 2026-06-28 chat session.
